scenario: ExecutionReport submitted with pre-task git status but no post-task git status, violating review-006. Without post status, reviewer cannot verify what the agent actually changed.
input_report_features: Report includes pre git-status snapshot but omits post git-status. The report claims 'task completed, files written as specified' but there is no verification of what was actually written. The pre/post pair is incomplete -- only one half exists.
expected_findings: Cannot verify what files were actually created or modified
review-006 violation: pre/post status pair required
Evidence chain broken: claim of completion is unverifiable
